description: CompositionBlack capris made of 95% cotton and 5% spandex, with a broad elasticated waist and embroidered nike Athletic Department badge near the left waistFittingSlimWash careMachine wash cold inside out with like coloursDo not allow to lay on itself when wetDo not bleachLine dryWarm ironDo not dry cleanStylish to the T, these cotton capris from nike are designed to keep you fresh and comfortable while you sweat it out at the gym or on the trail. The broad waistband sits snugly, offering a comfort Fit. Team it with Nike Athletic Department and sports shoes for that smart, sporty look.
